lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Top row (rows 0-8):")
for i in range(0, 9):
    print(f"  row {i}: {lines[i][4:58]}")

print("\nPalette (rows 56-61):")
for i in range(56, 62):
    print(f"  row {i}: {lines[i][4:58]}")

# Check segmentation for top row objects
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print("\nTop row objects:")
for n in nodes:
    minr = min(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
    minc = min(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
    if minr < 10:
        maxr = max(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])
        maxc = max(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])
        print(f"  {n['color']}: ({minr},{minc})-({maxr},{maxc}), center=({(minr+maxr)//2},{(minc+maxc)//2})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
